backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a chat app backend with global message board, user profile management, friend requests, and private message threads, protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence fixes: resolving the infinite 'Loading your profile...' spinner in ChatView and auditing the useQueries.ts getUserProfile hook to ensure all query terminal states are handled correctly.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-line summaries describing each component's or hook's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with app title, meta description, Open Graph and Twitter Card social sharing tags, favicon links, and the root div with the Vite module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders ChatView as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat UI component handling authentication gating, profile loading with a 10-second timeout fallback to prevent indefinite spinner, profile setup flow for new users, tab navigation, friends sidebar, private chat, and video call modal.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: Onboarding form card that lets new users enter a display name, auto-derives a username, calls the createUserProfile mutation, and invokes onComplete on success.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend entry in the friends list with avatar, online status indicator, display name, and a video call button that appears on hover.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the requester's avatar and name, plus accept and decline action buttons that trigger the respective mutations.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: Full friends sidebar panel with a search input, tabbed sections for friends list and pending requests, and the ability to send friend requests to searched users.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of global chat messages with color-coded avatars, distinguishing own messages from others, and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Controlled text input form for composing and submitting global chat messages, with loading state and Enter key support.
Private one-on-one chat view between the current user and a selected friend, showing the message thread, a send input, and a video call button in the header.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to create their profile by entering a display name and username, with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: React modal component for an active video call, displaying a remote participant avatar, local video PiP, and controls for mute, camera toggle, and ending the call.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, messages, friend requests, and message threads.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: Custom hook managing simulated video call state, including media stream acquisition, mute/camera toggles, and a timed transition from 'calling' to 'connected' status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base layers and CSS custom properties for a warm coral/amber light and dark theme, plus video call-specific color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, font family, and accordion animations, plus typography and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, feature history, known issues, and architectural notes for a chat app with friends, private messaging, and video calling features.
